reasoning: This sequence aims to capture the adventurous and forward-looking nature of Sagittarius. The animation will feature a dynamic arm movement, starting with a relaxed pose, transitioning to an outward reach, and finally settling into a confident stance. The use of both arms will emphasize the expansive and energetic spirit of the sign. Frame 1 shows both arms relaxed at the sides, palms inward. Frame 2 shows both arms extending outward, palms upward, symbolizing openness. Frame 3 features a slight downward curve of the arms, palms outward, hinting at a grounded yet ambitious spirit. Frame 4 shows the arms returning to a more relaxed position, but with a slight outward curve, suggesting a sense of calm confidence.
